name: remote-connector
description: Explicitly invoked remote SSH setup for Codex desktop connections.

interface.shortDescription: Explicitly invoke remote Codex SSH setup and login.
interface.longDescription: Remote Connector runs only when the user explicitly invokes or requests it by name. It verifies an SSH alias, copies the bundled Codex install script to the remote machine, runs it, opens a reverse proxy tunnel, starts device authentication, and prints the Codex desktop Add SSH connection fields.
defaultPrompt: Use Remote Connector to connect Codex to my SSH host dev-box
